productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Green Shorts
description: Style Note It is time for your little girl to dress it up this summer with this cool pair of shorts from gini and jony. These shorts when paired with a comfortable T-shirt and a pair of cool shoes, your girl is ready for a day out in the sun. Product Details A pair of green denim shorts, has two insert pockets in the front with one small patch pocket above the right pocket, two patch pockets at the back with thread detailing, crystal decorative buttons on the front pockets, foldable hems, elasticized waistband at the back, loops at the waistband for a belt and a zipper and button closure Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent inside out with like colours Do not tumble dry Do not iron over on decor
